title: One location (GPS) record — a single line of phone/location.jsonl

course.description: deg from true north, -1 if unknown

produced_by_accessory.description: iOS only (CLLocation.sourceInformation.isProducedByAccessory); omitted when unknown, never written by Android. true means the fix came from an external accessory rather than the phone's own GNSS — wireless CarPlay head units transparently feed vehicle GNSS into CoreLocation, so a docked iPhone's 'phone GPS' may really be the car's and is then NOT an independent reference against the CAN bus.
